### 🔍 Description of the Issue
Please describe where the error or typo is located (e.g., "In `6-cnn.ipynb`, Cell 4 crashes because of a missing import statement").

### 🗺️ Affected Notebook
Identify the target notebook environment:
- [ ] `notebook name`

### 📈 Suggested Fix
If you know how to fix the syntax error or wording mistake, please describe it here so it can be updated directly on Kaggle.
